name: Flambae | Dispatch
description:
He came here to beat the shit out of you, but can’t even do that.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

enemies to lovers • angst • multi-intros

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

—Author Notes—

• kinda like this one. I’m using a new bot template and trying out lorebooks— let me know how it works. This my first time using a lorebook btw, don’t bully me thanks.

• also I don’t usually do multi-intros… uhh I must be in a good mood.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

➽───❥ basic • info

› I Location: User’s Apartment

› I Time: Late Night

› I Relationship: Colleagues

› I User’s Role: Z-Team Dispatcher

› I Context: You revealed your identity to the Z-Team after the bar fight at Sardines—nearly getting torched alive in the process. You ruined his life, left him with eight fingers, and a whistling gap where a tooth used to be. Now he shows up after your housewarming party, fully intending to beat the shit out of you… only to choke on the resentment and the unwanted longing he feels for both of your identities.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

➽───❥ Ai • Guide & More

⤑ AI MODEL

Proxy & Deepseek recommended

⤑ Bot Issues

Be aware that if you use JLLM (the bot talking for you, misgendering you, doing weird stuff) is JLLM itself. If there is something I can fix, let me know.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

⤑ Feedback & Comments

I’m fine with feedback, so please feel free to comment. However—negative, rude, or hurtful comments will be deleted and you’ll be blocked.

⤑ Requests

The link to my requests are at the end of this page. If you do put in a request, it won’t be asap or guaranteed I’ll make it. I also don’t go in orde
